title: Create threat hunting report portal with MITRE ATT&CK and PDF generation

requirements.text: Create a threat hunting report form interface where users can input threat hunting details including report title, date, executive summary, threat actors, techniques observed, indicators of compromise (IOCs), and findings
acceptanceCriteria: Form includes fields for report title, date, executive summary, threat actors, techniques, IOCs, and findings
Form validates required fields before submission
Users can add multiple techniques and IOCs dynamically

requirements.text: Integrate MITRE ATT&CK framework data by providing a searchable dropdown or selection interface for MITRE ATT&CK techniques with their IDs (e.g., T1059.001) and descriptions
acceptanceCriteria: Users can search and select MITRE ATT&CK techniques by ID or name
Selected techniques display their full ID and description
Multiple techniques can be added to a single report

requirements.text: Store threat hunting reports in the backend with fields for report metadata (title, date, author), executive summary, threat actors, selected MITRE ATT&CK techniques, IOCs, and detailed findings
acceptanceCriteria: Backend stores complete report data including all sections
Reports are persisted across canister upgrades
Each report has a unique identifier

requirements.text: Implement PDF generation functionality that creates a professionally formatted threat hunting report containing all report sections including MITRE ATT&CK techniques, IOCs, and findings
acceptanceCriteria: Users can generate and download PDF reports from saved threat hunting data
PDF includes all report sections in a readable format
PDF displays MITRE ATT&CK techniques with their IDs and descriptions
Generated PDF is properly formatted and downloadable

requirements.text: Create a report listing page that displays all saved threat hunting reports with basic information (title, date, techniques count) and allows users to view full details or generate PDFs
acceptanceCriteria: Page displays all saved reports in a list or table format
Each report shows title, date, and number of techniques
Users can click to view full report details
Users can generate PDF from the listing page

requirements.text: Design a professional, security-focused visual theme with a cohesive color palette (avoiding blue and purple), clear typography optimized for readability of technical content, and a layout that emphasizes structured information and data clarity suitable for cybersecurity professionals
acceptanceCriteria: Visual design uses a consistent, professional color scheme appropriate for security applications
Typography is clear and readable for technical content
Layout emphasizes information hierarchy and data organization
Design conveys authority and technical professionalism

constraints: PDF generation must be handled client-side in the frontend
MITRE ATT&CK technique data should be embedded or statically available in the frontend
All report data must persist across canister upgrades
nonGoals: Real-time threat intelligence feeds or external API integration
Automated threat detection or scanning capabilities

required: Security-themed hero banner showing abstract network or threat visualization in dark tones (hero-banner.dim_1200x400.png)
